mapper.sql: id, package_id, candidate_version_id, current_version_id, result, generated_at, expires_at, confirmed_by, confirmed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_impact_preview WHERE candidate_version_id = #{candidateVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_impact_preview (id, package_id, candidate_version_id, current_version_id, result, generated_at, expires_at, confirmed_by, confirmed_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{candidateVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{currentVersionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{resultJson}, #{generatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{expiresAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{confirmedBy}, #{confirmedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
